canonical_title: Anthropic Claude Science in-house drug development plan
aliases: Anthropic wants to develop its own drugs
treatment: Treat as a follow-up to Claude Science. Do not repeat unless Anthropic gives official details on target diseases, wet lab plan, partners, clinical path, manufacturing, pricing, availability, or safety/research governance.
known_facts: Claude Science was already known as a scientific research workbench.
The Verge reported that Anthropic also wants to develop its own drugs, with an initial focus on neglected diseases.
Details on diseases, clinical path, partners, lab work, animal testing, trials, and manufacturing were not disclosed in the report.
reinclude_only_if: Anthropic publishes official details about in-house drug development.
Target diseases, wet lab plan, clinical path, manufacturing, or partner strategy becomes specific.
A credible source reports a materially new development or correction.
Claude Science product availability, pricing, admin enablement, or scientific workflow capability changes materially.
notes: Recovered after a scheduled LLM Night Lite run reported LEDGER_WRITE_FAILED because the old protocol tried to rewrite the full monolithic JSONL. This topic file is the durable replacement writeback.
